posts.author: PolishedGeek (Polished Geek | Platinum Partner)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @mikeeoxs - Welcome to the community. Sorry to hear you are having a problem connecting with someone. Are you looking for a general monday․com demo, or something tailored to developing custom monday apps? I ask because you posted this under the Apps and Developers area.

If you can provide a bit more info about what type of demo you would like, I may be able to help get you started. Our company Polished Geek is a Product-certified monday․com Partner and we also develop custom apps for the platform.
